'''Fondor II''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military base in the desert of the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The facility produced [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and other prototype vehicles, which bolstered local legends among the planet's ignorant native populace.

==Characteristics==
Fondor II was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]]. The base was surrounded by walls, and had a [[command center]], a [[Barracks|troop center]], a [[Research Center]], and various military production buildings (including a [[Factory/Legends|mech factory]]), along with a landing pad. It also possessed four watch towers as well as a power core in the open. An [[animal nursery]] sat just outside the walls.

==History==
During an Imperial [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|assault]] on Zaloriis some time before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], then-[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]] was captured by the [[Zalorian Separatists|planet's separatists]]. He was rescued by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and his troops, and they regrouped at Fondor II. At that time, the base was under attack by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel forces]]. Darth Vader and his troops cleaned out the base, and Colonel Veers directed them to his hidden research base, [[Camp Culroon]] where they produced the prototype [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] unit, ''[[Blizzard 1/Legends|Blizzard 1]]''. Vader's strike force then brought ''Blizzard 1'' back to Fondor II for its final outfitting. The AT-AT and other assembled military units then assaulted the Rebel base at [[Zaloriis City]], destroying its ability to make war.

==Behind the scenes==
The Fondor II base shares its name with the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], home to the [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|Fondor Shipyards]], a primary production facility of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Warship/Legends|warships]]. The base appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' during the Darth Vader campaign. The campaign is also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
